sql_array: CREATE TABLE airline_data (AirlineID Int32, FlightCount Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY AirlineID;
UPDATE airline_data SET FlightCount = FlightCount + 50 WHERE AirlineID = 1;
SELECT anyHeavy(AirlineID) AS frequent_airline FROM airline_data GROUP BY FlightCount;
SELECT AirlineID, anyHeavy(FlightCount) AS heavy_flight FROM airline_data GROUP BY AirlineID;
